name: fitfile

metadata.name: fitfile
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v2 (GPLv2)

documentation:
=======
fitfile
=======

Fit file parser.

modules.name: fitfile.file
documentation: Code that manages a FIT file.

classes.name: fitfile.file.File

methods.name: fitfile.file.File.__init__
documentation:
Return a File instance by parsing a FIT file.

Parameters:
----------
    filename (string): The name of the FIT file including full path.
    measurement_system (DisplayMeasure): The measurement units (metric, statute, etc) to uwe when parsing the FIT file.

methods.name: fitfile.file.File.date_span
documentation: Return a tuple of the start and end dates of the file.

methods.name: fitfile.file.File.utc_datetime_to_local
documentation: Return a local datetime based on the passed in UTC datetime and the file's known UTC offset.

methods.name: fitfile.file.File.__getitem__
documentation: Return the attribute named name.

methods.name: fitfile.file.File.__str__
documentation: Return a string representation of the class instance.
Object that represents a FIT file.
dynamically generated class properties
pylint: disable=no-member

methods.name: fitfile.measurement.Distance.kms_or_miles
documentation: Return the distance measurement as kilometers or miles depending on the measurement system.
@classmethod
def kms_or_miles(cls, distance, measurement_system=DisplayMeasure.metric):
"""Return the distance measurement as kilometers or miles depending on the measurement system."""
return distance.kms_or_miles(measurement_system)
